operator_prerequisites.description: Operator confirms the DevHub readiness reconciliation still limits the pilot to redacted metadata and safe read-only surface categories.
operator_prerequisites.go_no_go_effect: no-go if reconciliation has unresolved private artifact, automation, or official-action findings

operator_prerequisites.description: Operator confirms the post-decision release digest still defers authenticated DevHub work and records remaining blockers before any attended session is planned.
operator_prerequisites.go_no_go_effect: no-go if the release digest enables live authenticated automation or production readiness

safe_read_only_observation_scope.allowed_observation: Record only stable surface ID, redacted heading token, redacted label categories, and status category.
safe_read_only_observation_scope.redaction_requirement: All headings and labels must use bracketed redaction tokens from the reconciliation packet pattern.

safe_read_only_observation_scope.allowed_observation: Record only whether a read-only status category is visible; do not record permit numbers, addresses, names, files, or raw messages.
safe_read_only_observation_scope.redaction_requirement: Use status categories and journal event IDs only.

abort_triggers.trigger: Abort if automated login is requested, credentials or credential prompts are exposed, MFA or CAPTCHA appears, account creation is needed, cookies or auth state would be stored, or any private value becomes visible.
abort_triggers.operator_response: Stop observation and record a refused action template with redacted metadata only.

abort_triggers.trigger: Abort if a screenshot, trace, HAR file, browser artifact, raw authenticated text, or local private path would be created or referenced.
abort_triggers.operator_response: Do not capture the artifact; close the packet as no-go until the observation plan is revised.

abort_triggers.trigger: Abort on upload, submit, certify, payment, schedule, cancel, or any other official or financial control.
abort_triggers.operator_response: Do not interact with the control; carry the item as a manual handoff blocker.

manual_login_boundaries.boundary: The operator opens DevHub outside this fixture only after separate approval; manual login is performed by the human user, with MFA and CAPTCHA completed manually and no automation used for credentials.
No automation may create an account, recover a password, change account security, answer MFA, answer CAPTCHA, or collect credential material.
